questions.question: 1. Read each question carefully and respond honestly. Respond with the first thought that comes to you. Share your experience truthfully. All answers will be kept confidential and should be printed here. The questions must be answered in the same order that they appear. If you have any doubt, then ask the administrator. The following questions ask you about your feelings and thoughts. For each of the following statements, show how much you agree or disagree. Circle the answer statement on the basis of your experience over the last four days. Please answer the below questions on the note that each response is about your personal experience.
2. I have felt disconnected from the world around me. Strongly Disagree, Disagree, Agree, Strongly Agree
3. I did not feel that I really belong. Strongly Disagree, Disagree, Agree, Strongly Agree
5. I have felt distant from people around me. Strongly Disagree, Disagree, Agree, Strongly Agree
6. Not provided, please provide the text for question 4
